title: pinguicula balcanica subsp. balcanica
intro: Pinguicula balcanica subsp. balcanica, also known as the Balkan butterwort, is a carnivorous plant species belonging to the family Lentibulariaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The Balkan butterwort is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as aid in wound healing and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, and it can also be dried and used in capsules or tinctures.
